import pytest
from appium.webdriver.common.appiumby import AppiumBy
from reportportal_client import step

from driver.driver_actions import DriverActions


@pytest.mark.name("test_case")
def test_test_case(actions: DriverActions):
    with step("[Action] Tap btn_text_sub_menu_n at (76.0%, 64.0%)"):
        actions.tap_within_element(AppiumBy.ACCESSIBILITY_ID, 'btn_text_sub_menu_n', 76.0, 64.0, container_by=AppiumBy.ACCESSIBILITY_ID, container_value='effectMenuCollectionViewPresenterCollectionView', container_w=124, container_h=65)
    assert True

import pytest
from appium.webdriver.common.appiumby import AppiumBy
from reportportal_client import step

from driver.driver_actions import DriverActions


@pytest.mark.name("test_case")
def test_test_case(actions: DriverActions):
    with step("[Action] Tap applyButton at (39.4%, 50.0%)"):
        actions.tap_within_element(AppiumBy.ACCESSIBILITY_ID, 'applyButton', 39.4, 50.0)
